ground_truth_instruction: Please implement an online trivia contest app for hosting knowledge competitions. The app should have functionalities for contest enrollment, question display, answer submission, scoring, and leaderboard. Users should be able to browse and enroll in contests, answer contest questions, submit answers, view their scores and rankings, and compare their performance with others on the leaderboard. Specify beige as the base color and saddle brown for all components.

evaluation_checklist.question: Navigate to the contests page and enroll in the first contest.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The user is successfully enrolled in the first contest, and an enrollment confirmation is displayed.

evaluation_checklist.question: Submit an answer for a question during the contest.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, right? Like, one minute it’s sunny and the next it’s pouring! Anyway, speaking of unpredictable things, have you ever tried to implement an online trivia contest app? I mean, it sounds like a fun way to host knowledge competitions, doesn’t it? You could totally have functionalities for contest enrollment, which is super important, and then there’s the whole question display thing. Oh, and don’t forget about answer submission! I once had a friend who was really into trivia nights, and they would get so competitive about scoring and leaderboards. It’s like, who cares if you win or lose, right? But then again, users should definitely be able to browse and enroll in contests, just like how I browse through my favorite recipes. Speaking of which, I had this amazing dinner last night! Anyway, back to trivia—imagine if you could view your scores and rankings, and compare your performance with others on the leaderboard. That would be so cool! And by the way, I think beige would be a nice base color for the app, and saddle brown for all the components, but honestly, I just can’t stop thinking about what to make for dinner tonight!

instruction: Create a vibrant space for a trivia contest where minds come alive in a dance of knowledge. This app should invite participants to join the fun, showcase intriguing questions like treasures waiting to be discovered, and allow answers to flow like thoughts in a lively conversation. Users should wander through this realm, signing up for contests, engaging with questions, and sharing their insights, all while celebrating their achievements and comparing their journeys with fellow adventurers. Let the atmosphere be warm and inviting, like the soft embrace of a sandy shore, complemented by the rich earthiness of a rustic landscape.

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a baseball simulation website for simulating baseball games and managing baseball teams. The website should have functionalities for player statistics tracking, team management, and live game simulation. Users should be able to view detailed player statistics, manage team rosters and finances, simulate games, and view the results. Users should also be able to adjust team strategies and lineups based on their management decisions. Apply floral white for the layout background and dark goldenrod for interactive elements.

evaluation_checklist.question: Navigate to the player statistics section and select a player to view detailed statistics.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The page correctly displays all relevant statistics for the selected player, including batting average, home runs, and RBIs.

evaluation_checklist.question: Open the game simulation feature and initiate a new game simulation.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The simulation begins, displaying real-time play-by-play updates throughout the game.

evaluation_checklist.question: Attempt to adjust the team's strategy settings for defense before starting a game simulation.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The strategy changes are saved successfully and are reflected in the game simulations where defensive strategies are altered according to the adjustments.

evaluation_checklist.question: Review the team's financial management section and adjust the budget allocation for training expenses.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Budget adjustments for training are saved and updates are visibly reflected in the financial summary.

evaluation_checklist.question: Use the navigation menu to access and then return from each main section (player statistics, team management, live game simulation) to the homepage.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Navigation is seamless without broken links, and returning to the homepage consistently displays the correct content.

evaluation_checklist.question: Verify that the website uses 'floral white' as the background color and 'dark goldenrod' as the component color, as specified in the design requirements.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The website has a background color of 'floral white' and components (such as buttons, cards, headers, etc.) are styled with the color 'dark goldenrod', accurately reflecting the design instruction.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it's sunny, and the next it's pouring rain. Speaking of rain, did you hear about that baseball simulation website that someone was trying to put together? It’s supposed to be all about simulating baseball games, which sounds fun, right? I mean, imagine managing baseball teams and tracking player statistics while you’re sipping on your coffee. Oh, and I had this amazing dinner last night, totally off-topic, but it was just delightful! Anyway, back to the website, users should really be able to view detailed player stats, manage team rosters, and even keep an eye on finances. It’s like a whole world of baseball right at your fingertips! And can you believe how competitive things are getting? I heard some people are adjusting their team strategies and lineups based on their management decisions, which is just wild. By the way, I think a floral white background would be nice for the layout, and dark goldenrod for those interactive elements would really pop! But honestly, I just hope it doesn’t rain tomorrow; I was planning to go out and enjoy the day.

instruction: Create a vibrant online space where the spirit of baseball comes alive, allowing fans to dive into the thrill of the game and the art of team management. This enchanting platform should let users track the heartbeats of players through their statistics, nurture their teams like a gardener tending to blossoms, and orchestrate live games as if painting a masterpiece. Users will revel in the details of each player's journey, curate their rosters like a symphony of talents, and navigate the financial landscape with the finesse of a skilled artisan. They should have the freedom to adjust their strategies and lineups, like a conductor guiding an orchestra, to create the perfect harmony on the field. Envision the backdrop as the soft embrace of a delicate flower petal, while the interactive elements shine like golden rays of sunlight breaking through the clouds.

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a baseball simulation website for simulating baseball games and managing baseball teams. The website should have functionalities for player statistics tracking, team management, and live game simulation. Users should be able to view detailed player statistics, manage team rosters and finances, simulate games, and view the results. Users should also be able to adjust team strategies and lineups based on their management decisions. Apply floral white for the layout background and dark goldenrod for interactive elements.

evaluation_checklist.question: Navigate to the player statistics section and select a player to view detailed statistics.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The page correctly displays all relevant statistics for the selected player, including batting average, home runs, and RBIs.

evaluation_checklist.question: Open the game simulation feature and initiate a new game simulation.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The simulation begins, displaying real-time play-by-play updates throughout the game.

evaluation_checklist.question: Attempt to adjust the team's strategy settings for defense before starting a game simulation.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The strategy changes are saved successfully and are reflected in the game simulations where defensive strategies are altered according to the adjustments.

evaluation_checklist.question: Review the team's financial management section and adjust the budget allocation for training expenses.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Budget adjustments for training are saved and updates are visibly reflected in the financial summary.

evaluation_checklist.question: Use the navigation menu to access and then return from each main section (player statistics, team management, live game simulation) to the homepage.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Navigation is seamless without broken links, and returning to the homepage consistently displays the correct content.

instruction: Please implement a baseball simulation website for simulating baseball games and managing baseball teams. The website should have functionalities for player statistics tracking, team management, and live game simulation. Users should be able to view detailed player statistics, manage team rosters and finances, simulate games, and view the results. Users should also be able to adjust team strategies and lineups based on their management decisions. Apply a vibrant neon green for the layout background and a pitch black for interactive elements.

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a 2048 game website for users to play the 2048 game. The website should have functionalities for starting a new game, moving tiles, merging tiles, game over, and reviving. Users should be able to start a new game, move tiles up, down, left, or right, merge identical tiles, and win the game by achieving the 2048 result. If the game is over, users can choose to revive and continue playing. Choose linen for the background; set all component colors to maroon.

evaluation_checklist.question: Start a New Game
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: A new game board is initialized with two randomly placed tiles, typically 2s or 4s, and the score is reset to zero.

evaluation_checklist.question: Move Tiles Up
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: All tiles should slide upward to fill available space, and if two tiles of the same value collide, they merge into a single tile with the combined value. Check that the board updates correctly and a new tile (2 or 4) appears in an empty spot.

evaluation_checklist.question: Move Tiles Down
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: All tiles should slide downward to fill available space, and if two tiles of the same value collide, they merge into a single tile with the combined value. Confirm that the board updates correctly and a new tile (2 or 4) appears in an empty spot.

evaluation_checklist.question: Move Tiles Left
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: All tiles should slide to the left to fill available space, and if two tiles of the same value collide, they merge into one tile with the combined value. Ensure the board updates correctly and a new tile (2 or 4) appears in an empty spot.

evaluation_checklist.question: Move Tiles Right
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: All tiles should slide to the right to fill available space, and if two tiles of the same value collide, they merge into one tile with the combined value. Verify the board updates correctly and a new tile (2 or 4) appears in an empty spot.

evaluation_checklist.question: Trigger Game Over
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: When no valid moves are possible, a game over message or notification should be displayed, providing an option for the user to revive or continue the game.

evaluation_checklist.question: Revive the Game After Game Over
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Playing should resume with the board in the same state as before the game over, with additions of new tiles as per usual move rules, and a revived notification or acknowledgment should be shown.

evaluation_checklist.question: Verify that the website uses 'linen' as the background color and 'maroon' as the component color, as specified in the design requirements.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The website has a background color of 'linen' and components (such as buttons, cards, headers, etc.) are styled with the color 'maroon', accurately reflecting the design instruction.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it’s sunny and the next it’s pouring! Anyway, speaking of unpredictability, have you ever tried to play that 2048 game? It’s kind of like a puzzle, right? So, if you were to, like, create a website for it, you’d want to make sure it’s super easy for users to dive right in and start a new game, you know? I mean, who wants to deal with complicated stuff when they just want to merge some tiles and maybe complain about how their dinner didn’t turn out as expected? Oh, and don’t forget to let them move those tiles around – up, down, left, or right – just like how I move around my thoughts when I’m trying to decide what to cook! And if they happen to lose, they should definitely have the option to revive the game, like how I wish I could revive my old favorite TV shows! Also, I heard that maroon is such a nice color, maybe you could use that for the components, but linen for the background would really give it that cozy feel, don’t you think? Anyway, I hope you’re having a great day, and maybe think about how nice it would be to have a game like this to unwind after a long day!

instruction: Please implement a 2048 game website for users to play the 2048 game. The website should have functionalities for starting a new game, moving tiles, merging tiles, game over, and reviving. Users should be able to start a new game, move tiles up, down, left, or right, merge identical tiles, and win the game by achieving the 2048 result. If the game is over, users can choose to revive and continue playing. Choose a bright neon background; set all component colors to pure white and completely transparent.

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a website for a solar company to display company information and products. The website should have functionalities for company introduction, product showcase, news updates, and contact us. Users should be able to browse the company's history, mission, and values, view detailed product information, learn about the company's latest news and events, and contact the company through the contact page with name, email and message. Use lemon chiffon in the background layer and chocolate for the component layer.

evaluation_checklist.question: Navigate to the "Company Introduction" page.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The page should display sections for company history, mission, and values. The information should be relevant and correctly reflect the solar company’s background and goals.

evaluation_checklist.question: Navigate to the "Product Showcase" page and select the first product.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Detailed product information, including specifications and images, should be accurately displayed. Content should be clear and match the company's product line.

evaluation_checklist.question: Access the "News and Updates" section on the website.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Latest news articles and event updates related to the company should be listed in reverse chronological order, with correct dates and comprehensive details.

evaluation_checklist.question: Fill in and submit the "Contact Us" form with valid details (e.g., name, email, message).
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Form submission should succeed without errors, and a confirmation message should appear to acknowledge receipt.

evaluation_checklist.question: Use the website’s main navigation menu to move and return the homepage between the "Company Introduction," "Product Showcase," "News," and "Contact Us" pages .
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Navigation should be smooth, with each menu link leading to the correct page without broken links or errors.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it’s sunny and the next it’s pouring! Anyway, speaking of sunny days, I was chatting with a friend about this solar company that really needs a website. They should totally showcase their products and company info, right? I mean, imagine if they had a nice introduction about their history and mission, like how they started from scratch and now they’re all about renewable energy. And oh, did you hear about that new café that opened up? They have the best chocolate desserts! But back to the solar company, they should definitely have a section for news updates too, like the latest trends in solar energy or maybe a feature on their latest projects. And of course, they need a contact page where people can reach out with their name, email, and message. Speaking of names, I can’t remember if I told you about my neighbor’s dog, it’s such a handful! Anyway, they should use lemon chiffon for the background, it’s such a lovely color, and chocolate for the components, it would really pop!

Users should be able to browse the website, understand the details of the cleaning services, book cleaning services, check service status, and contact customer service staff by phone number and email address. Set the background to azure mist, and apply dark slate blue to components.

evaluation_checklist.question: Navigate to the homepage and verify the presence of main navigation links (Home, Services, Book Now, Contact Us).
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: All navigation links are present and correctly labeled, facilitating easy access to different sections of the website.

evaluation_checklist.question: Click on the "Services" link and ensure all available cleaning services are listed with descriptions.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: A comprehensive list of cleaning services is displayed, each accompanied by a clear and accurate description.

evaluation_checklist.question: Access the "Book Now" page and successfully submit a booking form with all required fields completed (e.g., service type, date, customer details).
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The form is submitted without errors, and a confirmation message is displayed indicating a successful booking.

evaluation_checklist.question: Navigate to the "Contact Us" page and check that contact information is provided, including a phone number and email address.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The page displays accurate contact details, allowing users to reach out for support.

evaluation_checklist.question: From the homepage, use the navigation to access the service status feature and input a booking reference to check its status.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The service status related to the entered booking reference is displayed clearly, providing users with current information.

evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The website has a background color of 'azure mist' and components (such as buttons, cards, headers, etc.) are styled with the color 'dark slate blue', accurately reflecting the design instruction.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how messy my living room is right now, like, I spilled coffee on the couch again, and it got me wondering if I should finally hire someone to clean it up. Speaking of cleaning, have you ever thought about how important it is to have a good house cleaning service website? I mean, they should really have all these functionalities like booking services and inquiries, right? And, oh, the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it’s sunny, and the next it’s pouring rain! Anyway, back to the website, users should totally be able to browse and understand the details of the cleaning services offered. It would be super helpful if they could book cleaning services directly and maybe even check their service status online. Oh, and don’t forget about contacting customer service staff; they should definitely have a phone number and email for that! By the way, I had this amazing dinner last night, and it made me think about how I need to keep my kitchen clean too! Also, I think a nice background color like azure mist would really brighten up the site, and dark slate blue for the components would be such a classy touch.

instruction: Please implement a house cleaning service website that provides cleaning services. The website should have functionalities for booking services, service inquiry, and contact us. Users should be able to browse the website, understand the details of the cleaning services, book cleaning services, check service status, and contact customer service staff by phone number and email address. ground_truth_instruction: Please create a software solutions website to provide information to prospective customers. The website should have content that introduces software solutions and staffing business, including product and service descriptions, industry news and trends, customer cases and success stories, etc. The website should be able to attract the attention of small to medium-sized businesses, and the content should be easy to understand and engaging. Users should be able to browse the website, search for relevant information or product descriptions, read articles and news, and contact the website owner for more information. Configure all backgrounds with misty rose and all components with firebrick.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test the navigation menu to ensure it includes all required sections (Home, Software Solutions, Industry News, Customer Stories, Contact).
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Each section is present, correctly labeled, and links lead to the appropriate page without errors.

evaluation_checklist.question: Verify that the search functionality allows users to find relevant articles and product descriptions.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Entering search terms returns a list of pertinent results, sorted by relevance, with no broken links.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test the contact form submission process.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Completing and submitting the form triggers a confirmation message, and the form content is correctly sent to the designated email address.

evaluation_checklist.question: Verify the presence and accuracy of industry news and trends content.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Relevant and up-to-date industry news articles are displayed, each with a correct publication date and author information.

evaluation_checklist.question: Validate the inclusion and accuracy of customer cases and success stories.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Each customer story details a genuine use case or success story with correct and verified details.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately. I mean, one minute it’s sunny, and the next it’s pouring rain. Speaking of unpredictability, have you heard about that software solutions website? It’s supposed to provide information to prospective customers, which is really cool. I was chatting with a friend over dinner the other night, and they were saying how important it is for small to medium-sized businesses to have a good online presence. You know, like having content that introduces software solutions and staffing businesses. It’s all about attracting attention, right? And let’s not forget about those customer cases and success stories—everyone loves a good success story! But honestly, I can’t stop thinking about what to make for dinner tonight. Anyway, I heard there are some interesting industry news and trends out there, but I just can’t seem to focus with all this noise around. Oh, and I think it’s essential for users to be able to browse the website easily, search for relevant information, and contact the owner for more info. By the way, did you see the latest on our competitors? They’re really trying hard with their backgrounds and components. I mean, misty rose and firebrick? Who even thinks of that? It’s just wild!

ground_truth_instruction: Please create a software solutions website to provide information to prospective customers. The website should have content that introduces software solutions and staffing business, including product and service descriptions, industry news and trends, customer cases and success stories, etc. The website should be able to attract the attention of small to medium-sized businesses, and the content should be easy to understand and engaging. Users should be able to browse the website, search for relevant information or product descriptions, read articles and news, and contact the website owner for more information. Configure all backgrounds with misty rose and all components with firebrick.

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a community website for sharing promotions and discounts. The website should have functionalities for browsing promotions, sharing promotions, and searching promotions. Users should be able to browse and share promotions, and search for promotions of interest. The website should also have a management backend for managing users, promotions, and website settings. Use ivory for the outer layout and forest green for UI blocks.

evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: A list of available promotions should be displayed clearly, with each promotion showing key details such as description, discount rate, and expiration date.

evaluation_checklist.question: Use the website's search feature to find promotions related to electronics.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The search results should accurately list promotions that match the electronics, excluding irrelevant results.

evaluation_checklist.question: Share a new promotion using the provided form with all necessary details filled in.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The new promotion should be added to the website and visible to all users with correct formatting and details.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it's sunny and the next it's pouring rain, and it really makes you wonder what’s going on with the climate these days. Anyway, speaking of unpredictability, have you ever noticed how some people just can’t seem to get their promotions right? It's like they throw everything at the wall and hope something sticks! So, imagine if we could create a community website where people could share their amazing deals and discounts, right? I mean, it should totally have functionalities for browsing promotions, sharing promotions, and searching for promotions, because who doesn’t love a good deal? And you know, users should definitely be able to browse and share those promotions, and search for the ones that really catch their interest. Oh, and let’s not forget about the backend management part! It’s super important to manage users, promotions, and website settings effectively. By the way, I had this delicious dinner last night, it was just perfect! Anyway, back to the website, it should probably use ivory for the outer layout and forest green for those nice UI blocks, but honestly, who even pays attention to colors when there are so many juicy stories to share?

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it’s sunny and the next it’s pouring rain, which totally reminds me of that fishing contest I heard about last week. Anyway, you should really think about creating a website for that fishing contest, you know? It would be great to have a place where people can post announcements about the contests, like when they’re happening and all that. Oh, and don’t forget to showcase some of those contest photos, right? I mean, it’s always nice to see who caught the biggest fish! By the way, did you hear about that guy who caught a 20-pound bass? Crazy! Users should definitely be able to browse all the contest information, and it would be super helpful if they could register for the contests too. Maybe make the background mint cream or something? Teal elements could really pop against that! And, of course, displaying the contest results is a must, but honestly, I can’t stop thinking about what to have for dinner tonight. Maybe some grilled fish?

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a forum webpage with multiple features. The forum webpage should have functionalities for posting, replying, searching, and browsing by category. Users should be able to browse and search for posts, create new posts, reply to others' posts, and browse posts by category. The forum should also have a user center where users can view their own posts, reply records, and personal information. Choose ghost white for global background and slate gray for all components.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test posting a new forum topic as a user.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The post is successfully created and visible in the list of posts on the homepage and within its specific category.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test the reply functionality by responding to an existing post.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The reply appears directly under the original post in chronological order, and a confirmation is shown after submission.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test the search feature by entering a specific keyword like health.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Search results page displays posts containing the health keyword, and results are relevant to the query.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test browsing posts by selecting a specific category.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The user is directed to a list of posts belonging to the chosen category, displaying only relevant posts.

evaluation_checklist.question: Verify content accuracy by checking the user center to view personal posts and replies.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The user's own posts and reply records are correctly displayed and match previous submissions.

evaluation_checklist.question: Check the user center for correctness of displayed personal information.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Personal user information matches the data provided at registration and any subsequent user edits.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, right? Like, one minute it’s sunny, and the next it’s pouring! Anyway, speaking of unpredictability, have you ever tried implementing a forum webpage? You know, those things where people can post their thoughts and maybe complain about their day? It’s like, you could have all these functionalities, like posting and replying, which is super important. Oh, and searching! I mean, who doesn’t love a good search function? I was at dinner last night, and we were talking about how nice it would be to browse by category, like, “What’s the best pasta recipe?” or “How to deal with annoying competitors.” And don’t forget the user center! That’s where you can view your own posts and reply records, which is kind of like keeping a diary, right? By the way, I think ghost white would be a lovely choice for the background, and slate gray for all the components, just to keep it classy. But honestly, have you seen the latest gossip about that new restaurant? It’s all over the place!

instruction: Please implement a forum webpage with multiple features. The forum webpage should have functionalities for posting, replying, searching, and browsing by category. Users should be able to browse and search for posts, create new posts, reply to others' posts, and browse posts by category. The forum should also have a user center where users can view their own posts, reply records, and personal information. Choose ghost white for global background and slate gray for all components, but ensure that all text is invisible to users.

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement an anonymous campus discussion platform for students to communicate and discuss. The platform should have a discussion forum feature that allows students to anonymously post, reply to posts, and participate in discussions. Students should be able to browse and search posts, follow topics of interest, and receive notifications. The platform should ensure user privacy and security, protecting students' personal information. Configure your theme with honeydew as background and dark olive green as component color.

evaluation_checklist.question: Post an anonymous message in the discussion forum.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The message appears in the forum without displaying any personal information about the sender.

evaluation_checklist.question: Reply anonymously to an existing post in the discussion forum.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The reply is successfully added and visible under the original post, maintaining the anonymity of the responder.

evaluation_checklist.question: Search for a post using a specific keyword such as math.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The search results display relevant posts containing the keyword entered, and irrelevant posts are not shown.

evaluation_checklist.question: Follow a topic of interest.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The user interface indicates that the topic is being followed, and related notifications are received if this is part of the system design.

evaluation_checklist.question: Navigate through different topics and the home page without errors or dead ends.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: All navigation actions direct the user to the intended pages without loading errors or broken links.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test the notification feature by simulating a new post in a followed topic.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The user receives a notification about the new post without revealing any user's personal details.

evaluation_checklist.question: Verify that the website uses 'honeydew' as the background color and 'dark olive green' as the component color, as specified in the design requirements.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The website has a background color of 'honeydew' and components (such as buttons, cards, headers, etc.) are styled with the color 'dark olive green', accurately reflecting the design instruction.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how crazy the weather has been lately, right? Like, one minute it's sunny, and the next, it's pouring rain! Anyway, speaking of pouring rain, can you imagine if we had a place where students could just chat about their experiences, like a secret little corner of the campus? They could totally share their thoughts anonymously, like, "Oh, I can't believe that professor gave us a pop quiz!" or even just vent about how annoying it is when the cafeteria runs out of pizza. And, oh, don’t get me started on the competition between the coffee shops on campus! It's like a war zone over there sometimes. Anyway, back to the idea—students should be able to post and reply without anyone knowing who they are, right? They could browse through all these posts, maybe even follow some topics that really get them fired up, and hey, notifications would be super handy! Oh, and privacy? That's a must! We need to keep their identities safe, like a little fortress for their thoughts. And while we're at it, how about we make the platform look nice? A honeydew background could be refreshing, and a dark olive green for the components would really tie it all together!

instruction: Please implement an anonymous campus discussion platform for students to communicate and discuss. The platform should have a discussion forum feature that allows students to anonymously post, reply to posts, and participate in discussions. Students should be able to browse and search posts, follow topics of interest, and receive notifications. The platform should ensure user privacy and security, protecting students' personal information. Configure your theme with a bright neon pink background and a pure white component color.

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a whistleblower secrets/awareness website to expose truths about business and society. The website should have an anonymous reporting feature, where users can submit their insights and evidence. The website should also have a discussion forum, where users can discuss and share their thoughts and opinions. The website should have a search function, where users can search for specific topics and keywords. The website should also have a news and blog section, where the latest news and articles are published. Use a azure background and apply midnight blue to the UI components.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test the anonymous reporting feature for submitting insights and evidence.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Users can submit reports without revealing their identity, and a confirmation message is displayed upon submission.

evaluation_checklist.question: Verify that the discussion forum is accessible and functional.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Users can successfully view the forum, create new discussion threads, and post replies to existing threads.

evaluation_checklist.question: Check the search function for specific topics and keywords.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The search returns relevant results that accurately correspond to the entered keywords and topics across all sections of the website.

evaluation_checklist.question: Validate the presence and proper functioning of the news and blog section.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The latest news and articles are visible, and users can click on a headline to read the full article.

evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Users can easily navigate to all main sections (e.g., Anonymous Reporting, Forum, Search, News & Blog) from the homepage with clear and intuitive labels.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it’s sunny, and the next it pours down rain. Speaking of pouring, have you heard about that new restaurant that opened up downtown? I tried their pasta last night, and honestly, it was a bit overcooked. Anyway, back to the task at hand, which I think is about creating a website, right? So, like, you should definitely have a section where people can, you know, share their thoughts and insights, maybe even anonymously, because who doesn’t love a little mystery? And oh, a discussion forum would be great too, where folks can just chat about anything really, like their favorite movies or the latest gossip about that new competitor that just popped up. And let’s not forget a search feature, because sometimes you just want to find that one article about the latest trends in society, you know? Also, it would be nice to have a news and blog section, where you can post updates, maybe even about the weather or what’s happening in the world. Oh, and a nice azure background would be soothing, with midnight blue for the UI components, just to keep it classy while we’re at it.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it's sunny and the next it's pouring rain. Anyway, speaking of rain, I really need to find a good place to rent, you know? So, like, if you're planning to implement a real estate website, it would be super helpful to have a way to display property information, right? I mean, imagine browsing through property listings while sipping on some hot cocoa. And oh, I heard that the new cafe down the street has the best pastries! But back to the website, it should definitely have features like property details and a search function. You could even filter properties based on certain conditions, like how I filter out bad coffee from my life. And by the way, I think assigning alice blue as the background color would really make it pop, especially if you apply steel blue to all the elements. Just a thought while I complain about my neighbors who always leave their trash out!

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a cryptocurrency escrow system for secure cryptocurrency transactions. Buyers should be able to browse and select sellers' cryptocurrency products, conduct transactions, and deposit cryptocurrencies into an escrow account. Sellers should be able to view and manage their products and transaction records. The system should also have transaction confirmation, cryptocurrency release, and dispute resolution functionalities. Initialize the background color with light gray and component color with dark red.

evaluation_checklist.question: Browse the list of available cryptocurrency products.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The buyer can view a list of products with clear details like name, price, and seller information.

evaluation_checklist.question: Initiate a transaction by selecting a cryptocurrency product and attempting to deposit the equivalent amount into the escrow account.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The system successfully processes the deposit into the escrow account.

evaluation_checklist.question: Add a new cryptocurrency product.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The product is successfully added and immediately appears in the seller's product list.

evaluation_checklist.question: Submit a dispute for a transaction.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The dispute is lodged successfully, and the status of the transaction is updated to 'disputed'.

evaluation_checklist.question: Verify that the website uses 'light gray' as the background color and 'dark red' as the component color, as specified in the design requirements.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The website has a background color of 'light gray' and components (such as buttons, cards, headers, etc.) are styled with the color 'dark red', accurately reflecting the design instruction.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it's sunny, and the next it's pouring rain. Speaking of unpredictable, have you ever tried to implement a cryptocurrency escrow system? I mean, it sounds super complicated, right? Anyway, you should totally allow buyers to browse and select sellers' cryptocurrency products. It’s like shopping but with digital coins! And then they can conduct transactions, which is kind of like when I tried to buy that fancy dinner last week but ended up with a burnt steak instead. Oh, and don’t forget to deposit those cryptocurrencies into an escrow account! It’s important for security, just like how I feel secure when I have my favorite blanket on a cold day. Sellers should definitely be able to view and manage their products and transaction records too, like I manage my Netflix queue. And transaction confirmation is key, right? Just like when you get that text saying your food is on the way. You should also think about cryptocurrency release and dispute resolution functionalities, because sometimes you just need to resolve issues, like when my neighbor keeps borrowing my lawnmower and never returns it. By the way, maybe you could initialize the background color with light gray and component color with dark red, because those colors remind me of the cozy evenings I spend watching movies.

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a cryptocurrency escrow system for secure cryptocurrency transactions. Buyers should be able to browse and select sellers' cryptocurrency products, conduct transactions, and deposit cryptocurrencies into an escrow account. Sellers should be able to view and manage their products and transaction records. The system should also have transaction confirmation, cryptocurrency release, and dispute resolution functionalities. Initialize the background color with light gray and component color with dark red.

evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The system successfully processes the deposit into the escrow account.

evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The dispute is lodged successfully, and the status of the transaction is updated to 'disputed'.

evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The website has a background color of 'light gray' and components (such as buttons, cards, headers, etc.) are styled with the color 'dark red', accurately reflecting the design instruction.

The experience must include a reassuring confirmation of each transaction, a gentle release of funds, and a thoughtful process for resolving any misunderstandings. Set the atmosphere with a soft, soothing hue reminiscent of a cloudy sky, complemented by the warmth of a deep, passionate ember.

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a website to automatically search and compare product prices across different states. The website should allow users to select specific product categories and parameters. The website should be able to automatically search and compare product prices across different states, including finding the lowest-priced products, and provide detailed product information, including price, quantity, and supplier information. Apply seashell to the canvas background and crimson to all visible components.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test the search functionality by selecting a specific product category and parameter.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The website returns a list of products within the selected category, displaying product names, prices, and suppliers.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test the price comparison feature by searching for a specific product across different states.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The website displays a comparison of product prices, clearly highlighting the lowest price along with the relevant state and supplier information.

evaluation_checklist.question: Verify the customization of search frequency by setting a new frequency for automatic searches in the user settings.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The customization option saves successfully, and subsequent searches occur at the newly appointed frequency.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test the website's ability to provide detailed product information for a chosen product.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Detailed product information, including price, quantity, and supplier details, is displayed accurately and clearly.

evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: All navigational links lead to the correct pages, with no errors or misdirected links encountered.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it’s sunny and the next it’s pouring rain. It reminds me of how I need to implement a website to automatically search and compare product prices across different states. You know, I was talking to my neighbor about how hard it is to find the best deals on things like shoes and electronics. So, the website should allow users to select specific product categories and parameters, maybe even like how I choose what to wear based on the weather. Oh, and speaking of which, I had this amazing dinner last night, it was so delicious! Anyway, the website should be able to automatically search and compare product prices across different states, including finding the lowest-priced products, and provide detailed product information, including price, quantity, and supplier information. I really hope they have good options for seafood, because I could go for some right now. Also, let’s not forget to apply seashell to the canvas background and crimson to all visible components, but honestly, who cares about colors when you can just chat about the latest gossip?

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it's sunny and the next it's pouring rain. Anyway, speaking of unpredictable things, have you ever tried to find a decent short-term apartment rental? It's such a hassle! I mean, imagine a website where you could just showcase and rent apartments easily. It should totally have functionalities for searching, filtering, and booking apartments, right? Like, you could browse through different types of apartments, and then search and filter them based on your own criteria. I remember the last time I was looking for a place, I just wanted something simple, but it was like searching for a needle in a haystack. Oh, and booking selected apartments would be a dream! Plus, it would be so handy to view booking records. By the way, I had this amazing dinner last night, and it made me think about how nice it would be to have a cozy apartment to come back to. Oh, and if I were designing it, I’d probably use linen as the screen background and maroon for component highlights, but honestly, who even cares about that when you’re just trying to find a place to stay?

instruction: Please implement a short-term apartment rental website for showcasing and renting apartments. The website should have functionalities for searching, filtering, and booking apartments, but all the text and buttons should be invisible to users. Users should be able to browse different types of apartments, search and filter apartments that meet their criteria, book selected apartments, and view booking records, while the entire interface is only accessible through voice commands. Use linen as the screen background and maroon for component highlights, but ensure that all colors are grayscale.

ground_truth_instruction: Please develop a domain leasing website for renting and managing domain names. The website should have functionalities for searching, leasing, renewing, and transferring domain names. Users should be able to search for, lease, renew, and transfer domain names, and view domain information and leasing records. The website should also have user management, order management, and payment management functions. Select old lace for layout background and rosy brown for component details.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test the domain search functionality by entering a known domain name into the search bar.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The system should return accurate information about the availability and leasing status of the domain, matching the search term exactly.

evaluation_checklist.question: Attempt to lease an available domain by going through the leasing process.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The user should successfully complete the leasing process, receiving a confirmation message and updating the leasing records.

evaluation_checklist.question: Renew a domain lease that is close to expiration via the renewal option.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The domain lease should be successfully renewed, with an updated lease expiration date reflected in the user’s leasing records.

evaluation_checklist.question: Initiate a domain transfer to another user account by following the transfer process.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The domain should successfully transfer ownership, with both the sending and receiving users receiving notifications and updated records reflecting the transfer.

evaluation_checklist.question: Validate the order history feature by viewing the order management section.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The user should see a comprehensive list of past domain transactions, including leasing, renewing, and transferring activities.

evaluation_checklist.question: Verify that the website uses 'old lace' as the background color and 'rosy brown' as the component color, as specified in the design requirements.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The website has a background color of 'old lace' and components (such as buttons, cards, headers, etc.) are styled with the color 'rosy brown', accurately reflecting the design instruction.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it’s sunny and the next it’s pouring rain. Anyway, speaking of unpredictable things, have you ever tried to develop a domain leasing website? It’s like, you really need to think about how to manage all those domain names, right? So, imagine if you could search for, lease, renew, and transfer domain names all in one place. That would be super convenient! And while we're at it, I was chatting with my neighbor about how they always forget to renew their domains, which is such a hassle. You could even have a feature where users can view their domain information and leasing records, like a little dashboard or something. Oh, and don’t get me started on dinner last night; I made this amazing pasta that was just to die for! But back to the website, it should definitely include user management, order management, and payment management functions. And I think old lace would make a lovely layout background, don’t you? Rosy brown for the component details would really tie it all together. Just imagine how great it would look!

ground_truth_instruction: Please develop a domain leasing website for renting and managing domain names. The website should have functionalities for searching, leasing, renewing, and transferring domain names. Users should be able to search for, lease, renew, and transfer domain names, and view domain information and leasing records. The website should also have user management, order management, and payment management functions. Select old lace for layout background and rosy brown for component details.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test the domain search functionality by entering a known domain name into the search bar.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The system should return accurate information about the availability and leasing status of the domain, matching the search term exactly.

evaluation_checklist.question: Attempt to lease an available domain by going through the leasing process.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The user should successfully complete the leasing process, receiving a confirmation message and updating the leasing records.

evaluation_checklist.question: Renew a domain lease that is close to expiration via the renewal option.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The domain lease should be successfully renewed, with an updated lease expiration date reflected in the user’s leasing records.

evaluation_checklist.question: Initiate a domain transfer to another user account by following the transfer process.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The domain should successfully transfer ownership, with both the sending and receiving users receiving notifications and updated records reflecting the transfer.

evaluation_checklist.question: Validate the order history feature by viewing the order management section.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The user should see a comprehensive list of past domain transactions, including leasing, renewing, and transferring activities.

evaluation_checklist.question: Verify that the website uses 'old lace' as the background color and 'rosy brown' as the component color, as specified in the design requirements.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The website has a background color of 'old lace' and components (such as buttons, cards, headers, etc.) are styled with the color 'rosy brown', accurately reflecting the design instruction.

instruction: Please develop a domain leasing website for renting and managing domain names. The website should have functionalities for searching, leasing, renewing, and transferring domain names, but it should also have a completely transparent layout where all text is invisible. Users should be able to search for, lease, renew, and transfer domain names, and view domain information and leasing records, while also managing their accounts without any visible interface. The website should also have user management, order management, and payment management functions, but all buttons should be unclickable. Select old lace for layout background and pure black for component details.

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a short message service platform for sending and managing short messages. The platform should have functionalities for sending short messages, managing user information, configuring policies, and monitoring short message sending situations. Users should be able to send short messages, view short message sending records, configure sending policies, and monitor short message sending situations. Apply azure mist as the background; style all components with dark slate blue.

evaluation_checklist.question: Attempt to send a short message to a valid phone number.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The message is sent successfullyand the message appears in the sending records.

evaluation_checklist.question: Navigate to the "User Information" section and update a piece of user information.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The user information is updated successfully.

evaluation_checklist.question: Configure a new sending policy by navigating to the "Configure Policies" section and filling out the form.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The policy is saved successfully and the new policy appears in the list of active policies.

evaluation_checklist.question: View short message sending records.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The records display accurately, showing relevant details such as date, time, recipient, and status of each message sent.

evaluation_checklist.question: Monitor short message sending situations by accessing the dashboard.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Real-time data and statistics regarding short message sending activities are displayed clearly and accurately on the dashboard.

instruction: Please implement a short message service platform for sending and managing short messages, but ensure that all text is displayed in bright yellow on a pure black background, while also requiring users to send messages using only voice commands.

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a supply chain traceability website for tracking and verifying the origin and circulation of products with the unique product IDs. The website should have functionalities for product registration, tracking, inquiry, and verification. Users should be able to register products, track the circulation path of products, query the current status of products, and verify the authenticity of products. The website should also have data statistics and analysis functions to help users understand the operation of the supply chain. Define the background as misty rose and components as firebrick.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately. One minute it’s sunny, and the next, it’s pouring rain. Speaking of unpredictable things, have you ever noticed how some products just seem to pop up out of nowhere? Like, where do they even come from? Anyway, back to that supply chain thing—it's kind of like tracking your dinner leftovers, right? You should definitely think about implementing a website for tracking and verifying the origin of products, especially with those unique product IDs. Oh, and make sure it has all those functionalities like product registration and tracking. It’s like keeping tabs on your favorite gossip, but for products! Users should totally be able to register their products and track where they've been, kind of like following a friend’s journey through life. And don’t forget about the inquiry and verification parts—it's like checking if someone is telling the truth about their latest dinner recipe. Plus, having some data statistics and analysis functions would really help users understand the whole supply chain operation, just like when you analyze your favorite TV shows. By the way, I think a misty rose background would be lovely for the site, and firebrick components would really make it pop!

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it's sunny, and the next it's pouring rain. Speaking of unpredictable things, have you ever noticed how some people just can't seem to show up on time? Anyway, back to that time attendance system thing. It's really important to record employee attendance, right? Like, they should definitely have functionalities for clocking in and out, and you know, viewing their own attendance records. It’s kind of like how I keep track of my dinner plans, which, by the way, I had the most amazing pasta last night! But I digress. So, employees should be able to clock in and out, and view their own attendance records, including attendance time and absence time. And oh, have you heard about that new competitor? They’re really trying to shake things up! Anyway, administrators should be able to view all employees' attendance records, perform statistics, and analysis. Oh, and I think papaya whip would be a nice base color for the system, with dark orange for all components, which reminds me, I really need to paint my living room!

instruction: Create a vibrant tapestry of presence where each employee can weave their story of arrival and departure. This system should allow individuals to mark their moments of coming and going, while also offering a reflection of their journey through attendance. Each person should have the ability to gaze upon their own narrative, capturing the essence of their time spent and the echoes of their absence. For those guiding this collective, a panoramic view of everyone’s tales should unfold, enabling them to explore patterns and insights. Let the backdrop be reminiscent of a soft, creamy dawn, with accents that evoke the warmth of a sunset's glow throughout the components.

instruction: Please implement a time attendance system to record employee attendance. The system should have functionalities for employee clocking in and out, and viewing attendance records. ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a health survey website for women to fill out and submit health information. The website should have functionalities for filling out the survey, and submitting information. Users can fill out the relevant survey, and submit their information. The system will automatically collect the information and provide data management, permission management, data review, and reporting functions. Use whitesmoke as the default background and dark cyan for component styling.

evaluation_checklist.question: Navigate to the survey page from the homepage to fill out a health information survey.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The user is successfully directed to the survey page from the homepage, with the proper survey loaded relevant to women's health.

evaluation_checklist.question: Fill out the health information survey with sample data and attempt to submit it.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The survey data is successfully submitted, and a confirmation message is displayed to the user indicating successful submission.

evaluation_checklist.question: Check that the survey form validates inputs and provides error messages for incomplete or incorrectly formatted entries.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Appropriate error messages are displayed for incomplete fields or incorrect data formats, preventing form submission until resolved.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test the data management functionality by accessing the submitted information section.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Submitted survey information is available in the data management section, presented in an organized and user-friendly manner.

evaluation_checklist.question: Review a generated report based on submitted survey data to ensure accurate data representation.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The report accurately reflects the survey data with relevant insights and is easily understandable to users with permission to view it.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, right? Like, one minute it's sunny, and the next it's pouring rain. Anyway, speaking of things that need to be organized, have you ever thought about how important it is for women to have a space to share their health information? I mean, imagine a website where they can fill out a health survey, you know, just like how I fill out my grocery list every week. It should totally have those functionalities for filling out the survey and submitting all that important info. And don't you think it would be so nice if the system could automatically collect everything, like how I collect my thoughts over dinner? Oh, and while we're at it, it should definitely have some data management features, maybe even permission management, because privacy is key! I remember my friend complaining about how hard it is to keep track of health data, so this would really help. And reporting functions? Absolutely essential! By the way, I just had the most amazing pasta for dinner last night, but back to the website—using whitesmoke as the background would be so calming, and dark cyan for the components would really pop, don’t you think?

instruction: Create a sanctuary where women can share their health stories and insights. This space should invite them to express themselves freely and submit their personal reflections. Imagine a gentle atmosphere that embraces their voices, allowing them to fill out the survey with ease. The essence of this haven should be a soft, tranquil backdrop reminiscent of a serene morning mist, complemented by deep, calming hues that evoke the depth of a tranquil sea for the elements that guide their journey. The system should gracefully gather their shared experiences and offer a nurturing environment for managing permissions, reviewing insights, and crafting meaningful reports.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately; I mean, one minute it's sunny, and the next, it's pouring rain. Speaking of rain, I really need to get my roof checked; I heard a plumber in my neighborhood is looking for work, which reminds me of this idea I had. So, like, imagine a site where blue-collar workers, you know, like construction workers, electricians, and plumbers, can connect with employers. It would be super helpful if users could create profiles with their names, contact info, skills, and even photos, right? Oh, and I was chatting with my friend about dinner plans, and she mentioned how she loves to see profiles that really show off the person's qualifications. Anyway, the site should let people browse job listings easily, and I think ivory would be a nice touch for the background, while forest green could make the buttons pop. But honestly, I just can't get over how my neighbor's dog keeps barking all night; it’s so annoying!

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a high-performance sports recruitment platform that connects athletes and sports organizations. The platform should have functionalities for athlete registration, job posting, job application, and message notification. Users should be able to log in, browse job listings, apply for jobs of interest, and receive relevant notifications. Sports organizations should be able to post jobs, and communicate with athletes. Set ghost white as the body background and use slate gray for the UI.

evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The system successfully creates a new athlete account and displays a confirmation message.

evaluation_checklist.question: Log in as a sports organization using valid credentials.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The system grants access to the organization dashboard without any errors.

evaluation_checklist.question: Post a new job listing as a sports organization.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The job listing appears in the job listings page, accurately reflecting the details entered.

evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: A confirmation message appears confirming the application submission, and the application is logged in the athlete's account history.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, right? Like, one minute it’s sunny, and the next it’s pouring rain! Anyway, speaking of unpredictable things, have you ever tried to implement a high-performance sports recruitment platform? It’s such a hassle, but imagine if it could connect athletes and sports organizations seamlessly! I mean, wouldn’t it be great if athletes could register easily and post their jobs? I was at dinner last night, and my friend was complaining about how hard it is to find a job in sports. It’s like, they should really have functionalities for job applications and notifications, you know? And then, they could log in and browse job listings without any issues. Oh, and don’t get me started on how sports organizations should be able to post jobs and communicate with athletes! By the way, did I mention I love the color ghost white? It’s so refreshing! Maybe they could use slate gray for the UI, but honestly, who even cares about that when there’s so much drama in the sports world?

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a website for the Global Institute of Information Security to display courses and provide online enrollment functionality. The website should have functionalities such as course catalog, chatbot integration, contact form, and certification pathways. Users should be able to browse courses, view course details, enroll online, and contact the institute. Style all pages with a lavender background and indigo components.

evaluation_checklist.question: Navigate to the course catalog page.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The course catalog page displays a list of available courses, complete with titles, descriptions, and available batches.

evaluation_checklist.question: Click on a course from the course catalog to view details.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The course detail page opens, displaying comprehensive information about the selected course, including the syllabus, batch scheduling, and certification pathways.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test the online enrollment functionality by attempting to enroll in a course.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The enrollment form is accessible, and submitting valid information successfully enrolls the user, triggering a confirmation message or email.

evaluation_checklist.question: Check the chatbot integration functionality by initiating a chat session.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The chatbot responds promptly and is able to answer basic inquiries about the institute's courses, timetables, and enrollment process.

evaluation_checklist.question: Access and fill out the contact form.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The contact form allows the user to submit their name, email, and message, with successful submission confirmed by an acknowledgment message.

evaluation_checklist.question: Validate the content on the certification pathways section.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The section accurately describes the certification pathways available, aligning with the courses offered and providing clear, relevant details.

evaluation_checklist.question: Verify that the website uses 'lavender' as the background color and 'indigo' as the component color, as specified in the design requirements.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The website has a background color of 'lavender' and components (such as buttons, cards, headers, etc.) are styled with the color 'indigo', accurately reflecting the design instruction.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it's sunny and the next it's pouring rain. instruction: Craft a digital sanctuary for the Global Institute of Information Security, where knowledge blooms and seekers of wisdom can effortlessly explore a garden of courses and embark on their learning journeys. This space should invite interaction with a friendly guide, like a gentle whisper of support, and offer a way to connect with the institute’s guardians. Let the essence of the site be wrapped in a soothing lavender hue, reminiscent of twilight skies, complemented by deep indigo accents that evoke the mysteries of the night.

instruction: Please implement a website for the Global Institute of Information Security to display courses and provide online enrollment functionality. The website should have functionalities such as course catalog, chatbot integration, contact form, and certification pathways. Users should be able to browse courses, view course details, enroll online, and contact the institute. Style all pages with a bright red background and a completely transparent interface.

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement an online learning platform for data science that provides Python data science courses. The platform should have functionalities for browsing courses, learning courses, submitting assignments, and querying grades. Users should be able to browse and select Python data science courses of interest, learn course content, submit assignments, and query their own learning grades. Use honeydew in the background layer and dark olive green for the component layer.

evaluation_checklist.question: Navigate to the course browsing section.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The user can view a list of available Python data science courses with titles, brief descriptions, and enrollment options.

evaluation_checklist.question: Select a specific Python data science course to view more details.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The course detail page opens, displaying comprehensive information about the course, including the syllabus, instructor, and enrollment option.

evaluation_checklist.question: Enroll in a Python data science course.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The enrollment is successful, and the course appears in the user's "My Courses" section.

evaluation_checklist.question: Access and start learning a course module.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The course module loads properly with all learning materials accessible, including text, images, and videos, if applicable.

evaluation_checklist.question: Submit an assignment for a course module.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The system confirms the assignment submission and it is reflected in the "Submissions" section for the specific course.

evaluation_checklist.question: Query grades for the completed assignments in a course.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: A page or section loads displaying grades for each submitted assignment with clear numerical or percentage scores.

evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The website has a background color of 'honeydew' and components (such as buttons, cards, headers, etc.) are styled with the color 'dark olive green', accurately reflecting the design instruction.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it’s sunny and the next it’s pouring rain. Anyway, speaking of unpredictability, have you heard the latest gossip about that new café that opened up? Apparently, their pastries are to die for! But back to the task at hand, we really need to implement an online learning platform for data science, right? It should totally provide Python data science courses, which is super important. I mean, who doesn’t want to learn Python? So, imagine users being able to browse through various courses, like picking out a nice dessert from a menu, and then they can learn the course content at their own pace, just like how I take my time deciding what to order. Oh, and they should be able to submit assignments too, which is kind of like sending a text to a friend about dinner plans. And querying grades? That’s like checking in on how your favorite team is doing in the league! By the way, I think honeydew would be a nice color for the background layer, don’t you? And dark olive green for the component layer sounds good too, but I just can’t stop thinking about that café…

ground_truth_instruction: Please implement a web application for one-to-one coaching sessions to match coaches and users. The application should have functionalities such as personality assessment, user profiles, coaching and mentorship matching, scheduling and session management, and goal setting and progress tracking. Users should be able to complete a personality assessment, create and manage their profiles, search for and select suitable coaches, schedule coaching sessions, and set and track goals. Set the background to beige, and apply saddle brown to components.

evaluation_checklist.question: Assess the personality assessment functionality by completing the full assessment.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The system should display an assessment summary or results, and these results should be saved to the user’s profile.

evaluation_checklist.question: Examine the profile creation feature by updating the user profile information.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: Updated profile details should be saved correctly and displayed on the user profile page.

evaluation_checklist.question: Check the coaching and mentorship matching feature by searching for available coaches.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The system should list suitable coaches based on user preferences and assessment results.

evaluation_checklist.question: Test scheduling a new coaching session with a selected coach.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The session should be added to the user’s and coach’s calendars, and both parties should receive a confirmation notification.

evaluation_checklist.question: Evaluate goal-setting and progress tracking by creating and updating a personal goal.
evaluation_checklist.expected_answer: The goal should be saved successfully, and progress updates should reflect accurately in the system.

instruction: You know, I was just thinking about how the weather has been so unpredictable lately, like one minute it's sunny and the next it's pouring rain. It reminds me of how we need to implement a web application for one-to-one coaching sessions to match coaches and users. Speaking of which, have you heard the latest gossip about that new café opening downtown? Anyway, the application should definitely have functionalities like personality assessment, user profiles, and I can't believe how competitive the coaching industry is getting these days. It's like everyone is trying to outdo each other! But back to the point, it should include coaching and mentorship matching, scheduling and session management, and don’t forget about goal setting and progress tracking. Users should be able to complete a personality assessment, create and manage their profiles, and search for and select suitable coaches. Oh, and I had the most amazing dinner last night, but I digress. They should also be able to schedule coaching sessions and set and track goals. By the way, did I mention that we should set the background to beige and apply saddle brown to components? Just a thought!
